textByHashes.0a13f98a9320c0bc7fa95ee6c694097ad3a1e84b: Hello, , you look familiar. Didn't I catch you going through my pockets not that long ago?
textByHashes.71b26afefd618ca7b790a73aebedab07a26bee96: Oh well, never mind. I have bigger problems to worry about right now.
textByHashes.d97c52834b24bf25f84e99a2ba345017660400d2: I can't chat now, I have too many things to worry about.
textByHashes.28b551c631c44971f3520f76985e250a028bf41d: I certainly could do with some help.
textByHashes.1cec43954d7ab37e870ce7384f998a72fd01ec86: It all seemed to start about a month ago. I grow roses, you know?
textByHashes.486d8909d54a1c92a032a6d4e2ab06e04afb0120: As I was saying about a month ago I noticed that the yield on my prize rose bushes had dropped slightly. I immediately suspected Crown Gall, a disease that can be fatal to a Mister Lincoln.
textByHashes.1953a0b749b5cbc44d41a6329c3cf55933ce637a: Sorry, Mister Lincoln's are the variety of roses that I specialise in. None of the plants showed any other symptoms of disease though. Then I noticed a reduced yield occurring in most of my other crops too.
textByHashes.e5cee41e9dc0d051caeb1d65a3a28a025bbe21fa: I spoke to other gardeners that I know, and they had all noticed similar problems.
textByHashes.55c8ec6b347eae562f57019f75380ffe456527b4: Vegetable patches are growing fewer vegetables, bushes are producing fewer berries and everything that is planted seems to be more prone to disease!
textByHashes.5f39f5fbdf8e1fcfe3100c049718457012edc84a: If you were more interested in turning your hand to farming, you would have noticed it too.
textByHashes.e278bef420945bce227f65745ffc55d669caf7e9: You've done some farming, haven't you noticed a decrease in the amount of produce you are getting lately?
textByHashes.ed12c6c9cacccb798441279643a48c9dbffe7195: I'd like you to find out what is causing this terrible problem and to try and rectify whatever the problem is.
textByHashes.2cb4be69c4db475504c0fb76033873fdc574d41e: If I were you I would start by speaking to some of the other gardeners.
textByHashes.0cec54f01da9774470d3583e0e6a721f8c08403d: I'm not sure I can, but I guess I have to try.
textByHashes.7ad95c41366711dedc443826e3dce6094ed67ec7: That banner is the emblem of the Group of Advanced Gardeners. We're a loosely affiliated group of gardeners that are united in our concern for declining vegetable production.
textByHashes.983c7193db236d91d7e9298a651e8efb08a80fa5: Say, you're a brave adventurer, would you be interested in trying to get to the root of our woes? There would be a cash reward if you could help us.
textByHashes.24f7286d31befa6debf3d9a792c33b0aa26bf0f8: I'm so glad to hear that.
textByHashes.78649004307c5a42f2e9257e493dcbd03e60cefb: Oh. Oh dear. Oh well, if there's nothing I can do to make you change your mind...
textByHashes.62fa3dbb9da2eb26ceee2a435192b8a4cb82a441: Well come back and chat to me if you change it.
textByHashes.69a5503e1477db2d3c5b9adca33e8a903e668a4d: Have you spoken to any other members of the Gardening Group yet?
textByHashes.1db78faa9bec1be0cf77428efb9581ee624b9222: Well please hurry, otherwise I won't be able to make enough produce to feed my 13 children soon.
textByHashes.b3dcdb419add0934ceffbcc11e8949e47a1ac4b2: I'm afraid that can't be the problem. It never rains on the farming patches. That's why we have to water the crops.
textByHashes.8ce4c841cbd56eea77ee403b7dd25db24bdbb73b: Go chat to some other group members. Maybe somebody has a different idea.
textByHashes.7ecb871b10dbba865d036a40e526f1fdbef021a1: Good idea, but I spray my crops with insecticide every week. No, that's not the problem.
textByHashes.6357320accf4794c68649d671ac047073ffb8c35: All right! All right! You're absolutely right! I never said there was a problem with anybody using my plots. Besides, we get part of our income from watching crops for adventurers. I'm afraid that our problem is
textByHashes.7363c24604b82a851f0084a8943837c048dc7b85: Yes, I've noticed that the seasons seem to be slightly confused, but that hasn't been a big enough change to affect the crops so badly. I'm afraid you should try a different branch of investigation to get to the root
textByHashes.7ab3292b76c76f3494eb3c4f022594218e513058: What are you laughing at? These are serious problems!
textByHashes.2724d43f7404304216443ae43a86f4722fb57a31: Hello again, . How are you getting on with solving the Gardening Group's problems?
textByHashes.db05fc1e842cc8593120248b9d5a99e718e51710: Hmm, that's an interesting idea. Now that I think about it that does make some sense. Yes, maybe you should talk to a fairy about it.
textByHashes.9fd59b98ccd9240e52f1f74a46141f80de8fbd64: No, sorry, but I did hear that there were some adventurers with a similar problem in the swamps near Lumbridge. Just don't mention my name if you talk to them, they're trying to keep it a secret, but everybody actually knows what they're up to.
textByHashes.034df97a67894492d314e04ca5fd4c5c16fb0ff4: I'm glad to hear it, but if you don't mind I'll go and plant some seeds now and wait until they grow before I give you the reward that I promised.
textByHashes.8b73c8b86f68e813037e6d3bacb687fe236bb6d0: Great! I'll see you soon then.
textByHashes.6a5d37817ee15ac23028929d805a7c889800c06f: Stop being so impatient, . They'll grow in their own good time - come back later.
textByHashes.5dc7558326541366bf5b16bdfa130d72e6486e5f: Well, you've got a nerve showing up around here again!
textByHashes.16bb23983c457ddf68bebe552ccb70b6268e6b6e: You told me that you'd solved the problems of the Gardening Group's members, well I've planted loads of seeds since then and there's no doubt that even more plants are dying!
textByHashes.22b635fddcef6c5465421b1c93412420159bdf6b: Yah, sure, whatever. You know, I didn't believe you when you told me that story about 'the fairies' in the first place. You'd just better solve this problem, when people get hungry, they get angry and you're the
textByHashes.4c5635007edcb100abb01f2a4a8669e5d731a7a8: person who said that everything would be all right, so you're the person who they'll get angry with!
textByHashes.3e74417a33d1b2a4809062187622fcc2d8bcf9fe: Hello again, . Our crops are still failing. Please do something fast, the food reserves are starting to fail. People will start to realise that there is an imminent food crisis soon!
textByHashes.7f99cdd69e980f7317bd2a6e04525b4dc338b2ca: Please hurry. Things are getting dire!
textByHashes.d70b4b62f0ee3d8c618ae72de55d294848b51d34: This is a Skillcape of Farming, isn't it incredible? It's a symbol of my ability as the finest farmer in the land and wearing it increases my herb yield!
textByHashes.984eafbce7eedddb3bf8764c5f940ceea79a62f7: Of course, fellow farmer. If you wear this cape you'll receive increased yields from your herbs. That'll be 99000 coins.
textByHashes.725c0b61fb4fac5d49e1e3509ad381a961f58fc6: No skin off my teeth, but if you change your mind, the price will still be the same.
textByHashes.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHashes.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHashes.bd6134f083038e1d03e937a112251a7fbf544b41: That's true; us Master Farmers are a unique breed.
textByHashes.845079ccec7499becb9692934a117c70f2409775: Hmm, right. You'll forgive me if I reserve judgement on this until I actually have some crops grow.
textByHashes.46bfa5ed77860ceae07c362a83b07840b68dacc4: Godfather...Fairy Nuff...the Queen, I don't know what you're talking about and I don't care. I just want my crops to start growing again. Come back and claim your reward once they've had a chance to grow.
textByHashes.774f68e26ef70b3345c469ef6d14ddeb94b8ed6f: Cor blimey mate, what are ye doing in me pockets?
textByHashes.745dee30b8f9121e68b4073a9b1549f873716a5a: You're the thief who stole from me!
